about_text: I am a French web development student focused on back-end development. I enjoy designing and structuring the logic that powers an application, turning ideas into robust, high-performance, and reliable systems. Passionate about server-side technologies, I build secure, efficient, and scalable architectures while following best development practices. My goal is to provide a solid foundation that allows applications to run smoothly, reliably, and optimally. Curious and motivated, I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to deepen my skills and grow in this constantly evolving field.
